/usr/bin/cc  -std=c99 -Wall -fdiagnostics-show-option -Wno-error -w -DLA_HIGH_PERFORMANCE -DBLASFEO_REF_API -DMF_PANELMAJ -DK_MAX_STACK=300 -DUSE_C99_MATH -DEXT_DEP -DEXT_DEP_MALLOC -DOS_LINUX -DEXTERNAL_BLAS_NONE -O2 -fPIC -DTARGET_X64_INTEL_HASWELL -DTARGET_PHANTOM -m64 -mavx -mavx2 -mfma -O3 -DNDEBUG   CMakeFiles/example_d_lu_factorization.dir/example_d_lu_factorization.c.o  -o example_d_lu_factorization  -Wl,-rpath,/home/kesl/ke/third_party/acados/build/external/blasfeo ../libblasfeo.so.0.1.4.2 -lm
